brand.panel_headline: Your animal's identity, always with you.
brand.panel_body: Register the microchip, certify, and recover. A network built for owners and clinics.

common.name: First name
common.phone_hint: We'll use it to contact you if your pet is found.

document.lookup_error: Could not look up the DNI. Please try again.
document.lookup_rate_limit: Lookup limit reached. Try again later.
document.lookup_success: Details found. Review first and last names.
document.dni_hint: In Peru, DNI is 8 digits. Use the search icon to autofill.

onboarding.title: Verify your identity
onboarding.subtitle: To continue with {{email}}, confirm your ID document.
onboarding.hint: Enter your DNI and tap search to load your official first and last names.

choose.head_title: How do you want to start?
choose.title: How do you want to start?
choose.subtitle: Choose your profile so we take you to the right registration.
choose.owner_body: Check chips, claim pets registered by your clinic, and sign in with Google or email.
choose.clinic_body: Register your clinic with RUC and enroll owners, pets, and microchips.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Owners and clinics sign in here with email. Google is for owners only.
login.google_error: We couldn't sign you in with Google. Please try again.

register.title: Create your owner account
register.subtitle: This registration is for pet owners. Clinics use RUC.

clinic.title: Register your clinic
clinic.subtitle: Look up by RUC (11 digits) and create the admin account.
clinic.lookup_error: Could not look up the RUC. Please try again.
clinic.lookup_success: Details found. Review the business name.

step_subtitles.1: First identify your clinic with the RUC.

validation.organization_name: Look up the RUC or enter the business name.

forgot_password.title: Forgot password
forgot_password.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a password reset link

reset_password.title: Reset password
reset_password.subtitle: Please enter your new password below

verify_email.title: Email verification
verify_email.subtitle: Please verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you.
verify_email.sent: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.

two_factor.code_subtitle: Enter the authentication code provided by your authenticator application.
two_factor.recovery_subtitle: Please confirm access to your account by entering one of your emergency recovery codes.

confirm_password.title: Confirm password
confirm_password.subtitle: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.
